items.summary: On the landing page (/), reduce the game logo (gamelogo.png) size so it appears noticeably smaller than its current size on desktop. It should still be responsive (scaling down on mobile/tablet with max-width: 100% and auto height), but the desktop maximum size must be reduced — use a max-width in the range of 480px–560px (down from the current full natural width) so it no longer dominates the viewport.

Add a stable text variable `youtubeLink` to the backend actor in backend/main.mo, initialized to 'https://youtu.be/5in-hIASH08'. Include it in the record returned by getContent(). Add an admin-only update method updateYoutubeLink(link: Text) that verifies the caller is the registered admin before persisting the new value. Reject with 'Access denied' otherwise.

Add a YouTube Link field to the Admin Dashboard (/admin) CMS. It must be a text input pre-populated with the current youtubeLink value from getContent(), with a Save button that calls updateYoutubeLink() and then invalidates/refetches the content query. Add the corresponding useUpdateYoutubeLink mutation to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts.

Update the VideoSection component on /press-kit to use the youtubeLink value from the global content query (returned by getContent()) instead of a hardcoded YouTube URL. When the user clicks the video thumbnail play button, the embedded YouTube iframe must use this admin-editable link.
